title: Navigating with Finder
description: Learn to navigate through files and folders using Finder.

steps.hint: Click the Finder icon (📁) in the Dock at the bottom.

steps.instruction: In the Finder sidebar on the left, click 'Documents' to navigate there.
steps.hint: Look at the left sidebar of the Finder window. Under 'Favorites', click 'Documents'.

steps.instruction: You should see Notes.txt and Report.docx. Now click 'Downloads' in the sidebar.
steps.hint: In the sidebar, click 'Downloads' to navigate to the Downloads folder.

steps.instruction: Now click 'Desktop' in the sidebar to go back to the Desktop.
Try switching to List view using the view toggle buttons in the toolbar.
steps.hint: Look at the top-right of the Finder toolbar for small view toggle buttons (≡ for list view).

steps.instruction: Navigate to the Applications folder by clicking it in the sidebar.
steps.hint: Scroll down in the sidebar and click 'Applications'.

steps.instruction: Use the Back button (◀) in the Finder toolbar to go back to the previous folder.
steps.hint: Click the left arrow (◀) at the top-left of the Finder content area.
